item.title: Treasury, OCC and FDIC begin GENIUS Act rulemaking setting AML and reserve compliance standards for U.S. stablecoin issuers.
SEC sets July targets for crypto rulemaking covering token offerings, broker-dealer custody and digital asset trading venues.
White House schedules high-level meeting with senators to resolve CLARITY Act ethics provisions and advance market-structure bill.
MiCA enforcement ends EU transitional period, triggering exchange cutoffs for unlicensed crypto firms across European markets.
U.S. and UK publish 10-point joint roadmap to coordinate oversight of stablecoins, tokenized assets and cross-border digital markets.
UK government launches 54-firm tokenization taskforce including BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley.
DTCC moves tokenized securities into live trading with major Wall Street banks in blockchain settlement milestone.
BlackRock, Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan join DTCC pilot to test tokenized stocks on blockchain settlement infrastructure.
Swift activates 24/7 blockchain payment infrastructure with 17 global banks across six continents.
Morgan Stanley wins preliminary OCC approval for digital-asset trust bank to bring crypto custody and staking in-house.
Circle wins OCC approval to establish national trust bank for institutional digital asset custody services.
Ostium loses $18 million to oracle manipulation attack, draining nearly one-third of the perpetuals exchange's $63 million TVL.
BIS finds $3.5 billion stablecoin inflows push down short-term U.S. Treasury yields, raising sovereign funding stability concerns.
EDX Markets raises $76 million in Series C funding led by SBI Holdings to expand institutional crypto trading operations.
